hero.headline: A professional Indian hospitality platform designed with monumentality, ritual rhythm, and modern product clarity.
hero.subheadline: White Hat is a full-stack culinary hiring and reputation platform shaped by South Indian temple geometry, stone-and-brass material cues, and a refined red-line interface system.

highlights: Scarlet line highlights direct attention across the interface like a ceremonial axis
Temple-inspired hierarchy gives the website a stronger Indian identity without hurting usability
Chef discovery, learning, trust signals, and intake remain fully connected to the backend
Premium visual language built to present Indian culture in a polished professional format

businessSignals.title: Culture-rooted interface
businessSignals.body: The experience represents India through form, pattern, material, and rhythm instead of using generic startup design tropes.

businessSignals.title: Red-line navigation system
businessSignals.body: Scarlet highlights, rails, and sectional thresholds guide movement clearly while making the page feel custom and memorable.

businessSignals.title: Full-stack credibility
businessSignals.body: The design is bold, but the product remains practical with live filters, structured data, and backend-connected lead capture.
